experience.title: Junior Financial Assistant
responsibilities: Assisted in preparing financial documents and reports for management
Conducted basic data entry and maintained financial records
Supported senior analysts in compiling budgets and forecasts
achievements: Improved reporting accuracy by 15% through careful data checks
Streamlined financial documentation process, reducing time spent by 20%

response.summary: Detail-oriented business graduate with experience as a Junior Financial Assistant. Skilled in basic financial reporting and data entry, seeking to transition into a more analytical finance role.
